notes: Production deployment was made from a temporary source copy without .git metadata.

Public verification remains available; hosted live write actions are disabled.
CodeGuardian reports live 0G Chain evidence with deterministic hybrid 0G Storage and 0G Compute proof artifacts.

CodeGuardian profile labels Chain as live, Storage/Compute as hybrid, and DA/ENS as mock.

ENS is explicitly not targeted in this submission; any ENS evidence is mock compatibility metadata only.
The deployment completed successfully and was aliased to the production URL by Vercel.
